stats.desc1: Space, light and a carefully designed layout.
stats.desc2: Enjoy the pool, coworking, gym and much more.

description.locationText: In La Nucía, close to everything.
description.paragraph1: Located in one of the municipalities with the highest quality of life on the Costa Blanca, this residential complex allows you to enjoy tranquility with nearby green spaces, while all the services you need are within reach: beaches, supermarkets, sports centres, schools and hospitals.
description.paragraph2: La Nucía One offers you a Mediterranean lifestyle. Spacious homes with 2, 3 and 4 bedrooms, large windows and a carefully designed layout. A unique design, created for residential living, with comprehensive communal facilities designed for enjoyment: infinity pool, coworking, gym, landscaped gardens, children's area and much more.
description.buildingAlt: New construction building in La Nucía

items.title: 2, 3 and 4 bedrooms
items.description: Spacious homes designed for family comfort with top-quality finishes.

items.title: Community pool
items.description: Enjoy a large pool area with solarium and relaxation areas.

items.title: Landscaped gardens
items.description: Extensive green spaces with Mediterranean vegetation for your peace of mind.

items.title: Spacious terraces
items.description: Generous terraces to enjoy the Mediterranean climate all year round.

items.title: Parking space
items.description: Private parking spaces and storage rooms included in the development.

items.title: Energy efficiency
items.description: Latest generation materials and high-level energy certification.

images.alt: Exterior facade of La Nucía One
images.label: Facade

items.title: Structure
items.description: Foundation and structure calculated according to current regulations, with solid slab floors and reinforced concrete columns, providing greater solidity and acoustic insulation.

items.title: Facade
items.description: Facade composed of ceramic enclosure with ETICS external thermal insulation, improving thermal comfort by eliminating thermal bridges and reducing consumption.

items.title: Climate control
items.description: Highly energy-efficient aerothermal system for climate control and hot water. Air distribution through ducts integrated into the false ceiling.

items.title: Kitchens
items.description: Furnished kitchen equipped with top-brand appliances. Compact quartz countertop and modern high-capacity design.

items.title: Carpentry
items.description: Exterior PVC carpentry with Climalit-type glass. White lacquered interior doors with steel hardware. Modular built-in wardrobes.

items.title: Energy Efficiency
items.description: High energy rating thanks to quality materials and aerothermal systems that contribute to lower consumption and environmental care.

location.description: La Nucía is one of the municipalities with the highest quality of life on the Costa Blanca. With an exceptional climate of over 300 sunny days a year, excellent sports and cultural infrastructure, and a strategic location between the mountains and the sea.
highlights: Sierra de Aitana as a backdrop
